metadata.title: La Bella Aesthetics — Premium Aesthetic Treatments in Munich
metadata.description: Premium aesthetic and skincare treatments in Munich. Facials, PRP, laser therapy and more — personalised, medically grounded, in an elegant setting.

hero.subtitle: Premium aesthetic treatments in Munich — tailored to you, medically grounded, and crafted with a feel for natural elegance.

services.title: Treatments that make you glow
services.subtitle: From deep-acting facials to the latest laser technology — tailored to your skin.

facials.title: Facials
facials.description: Tailored facial treatments for visibly clear, fresh and radiant skin.

prp.title: PRP & Microneedling
prp.description: Natural regeneration using your own plasma — for firmer, youthful skin.

laser.title: Laser Therapy
laser.description: Precise laser treatments for pigment spots, redness and unwanted hair.

about.title: Beauty begins with trust
about.body: In the heart of Munich we combine medical expertise with a feel for natural aesthetics. Every treatment begins with a personal consultation — because your skin is as unique as you are.

items.quote: I felt comfortable from the very first minute. My skin has never been so radiant.
items.name: Sophia M.

items.quote: Professional, warm and absolutely competent. La Bella is my new favourite place in Munich.
items.name: Elena R.

items.quote: Finally a studio that listens to what I want. The result exceeds all expectations.
items.name: Carolin B.

bookingCta.title: Ready to discover your true beauty?
bookingCta.subtitle: Book your appointment now — we look forward to seeing you.

items.q: How does the first treatment work?
items.a: Every treatment starts with a thorough, free consultation. Together we analyse your skin and put together a personalised plan.
Most of our treatments are virtually pain-free. If needed, we use numbing creams so you feel completely at ease.

items.q: How many sessions do I need?
items.a: That depends on the treatment and your individual goal. During the consultation you'll get an honest assessment and recommendation.
Of course. Appointments can be rescheduled or cancelled free of charge up to 24 hours in advance.

footer.tagline: Premium aesthetic treatments in the heart of Munich.

treatments.metaDescription: Discover our premium aesthetic treatments in Munich: Signature Facial, HydraFacial, microneedling, PRP, laser hair removal and wrinkle treatment.
treatments.title: Treatments
treatments.subtitle: Medically grounded, individually tailored — for visibly more beautiful skin.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Get to know La Bella Aesthetics: medical expertise, natural aesthetics and a warm team in the heart of Munich.
aboutPage.title: Beauty begins with trust
aboutPage.intro: In the heart of Munich we combine medical expertise with a fine feel for natural aesthetics.
aboutPage.story1: La Bella Aesthetics was born from one conviction: real beauty comes from feeling at home in your own skin. That is why every treatment with us begins by listening and an honest, personal consultation.
aboutPage.story2: Our specialists combine cutting-edge technology with premium products and the highest medical standards. The result: natural, visible results in an atmosphere where you can fully relax.

values.title: Individual
values.text: No off-the-shelf standard — every treatment is tailored to you.

values.title: Medically grounded
values.text: Highest hygiene and quality standards, certified specialists.

values.title: Natural
values.text: We enhance your beauty rather than changing it.

aboutPage.teamSubtitle: Experienced specialists who love their craft.

team.name: Isabella Romano
team.bio: Over 12 years of experience in aesthetic skincare and anti-aging.

team.name: Dr. Lena Vogt
team.bio: Specialised in gentle, natural wrinkle treatments.

team.name: Marie Keller
team.bio: Expert in facials, HydraFacial and skin analysis.

galleryPage.disclaimer: Note: For legal reasons (German HWG) we only show before-and-after images with consent and during a personal consultation on site.
